output:
```yaml
name: PR Checks

on:
  pull_request:

jobs:
  main-coverage:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      percentage: ${{ steps.get-coverage.outputs.percentage }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.base_ref }}
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v3
      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - run: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test --coverage --coverageReporters=json-summary
      - name: Get main coverage
        id: get-coverage
        run: echo "percentage=$(jq '.total.lines.pct' coverage/coverage-summary.json)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

  pr-checks:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      percentage: ${{ steps.get-coverage.outputs.percentage }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v3
      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - run: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test --coverage --coverageReporters=json-summary
      - name: Get PR coverage
        id: get-coverage
        run: echo "percentage=$(jq '.total.lines.pct' coverage/coverage-summary.json)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

  compare-coverage:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [main-coverage, pr-checks]
    if: success()
    steps:
      - uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const mainPct = parseFloat(${{ needs.main-coverage.outputs.percentage }});
            const prPct = parseFloat(${{ needs.pr-checks.outputs.percentage }});
            const drop = mainPct - prPct;
            if (drop > 5) {
              const body = `Coverage dropped from ${mainPct}% on main to ${prPct}% on this PR (a drop of ${drop.toFixed(2)}%).`;
              await github.rest.issues.createComment({
                issue_number: context.issue.number,
                owner: context.repo.owner,
                repo: context.repo.repo,
                body: body
              });
            }
```
